cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu tak, aby nakreslila [hlp]rovnostranný trojúhelník o straně 80 bodů[/hlp]. Nezapomeňte pero spustit!
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
